symbols.name: RuleBuilder
symbols.summary: Provides a fluent interface for building and executing collections of rules. Usage example: return Rule // Basic validation using ValueRules .Add(Rules.IsNotEmpty(product.Name)) .Add(Rules.StringLength(product.Name, 3, 100)) .Add(Rules.NumericRange(product.Price, 0.01m, 999.99m)) // Conditional validation with When .When(!product.IsDigital, builder => builder .Add(Rules.IsNotEmpty(product.ShippingAddress)) .Add(Rules.StringLength(product.ShippingAddress, 10, 200))) // Using Unless (inverse of When) .Unless(product.IsDigital, Rules.GreaterThan(product.Price, 10m)) // Combining multiple conditions .WhenAll(new[] { product.Price > 100, product.IsDigital, product.Categories?.Count > 2 }, Rules.IsNotEmpty(product.ShippingAddress)) .Check();

symbols.name: ContinueOnFailure()
symbols.summary: Enables error aggregation, collecting all rule failures instead of stopping at the first failure.

returns.description: The current builder instance for method chaining.
The current builder instance for method chaining.

symbols.name: ThrowOnFailure(bool)
symbols.summary: Sets whether to throw an exception if a rule fails.

parameters.description: Indicates whether to throw an exception on rule failure.

returns.description: The current builder instance for method chaining.

parameters.description: Indicates whether to throw an exception on rule failure.

returns.description: The current builder instance for method chaining.

symbols.name: ThrowOnException(bool)
symbols.summary: Sets whether to throw an exception if a rule throws an exception.

parameters.description: Indicates whether to throw an exception on rule exception.

returns.description: The current builder instance for method chaining.

parameters.description: Indicates whether to throw an exception on rule exception.

returns.description: The current builder instance for method chaining.

symbols.name: Check()
symbols.summary: Applies the rules synchronously to validate a single object or state. If continueOnFailure is disabled (default), stops at the first rule failure. If continueOnFailure is enabled, collects all rule failures.

returns.description: A Result object indicating the success or failure of applying the rules.
A Result object indicating the success or failure of applying the rules.

symbols.name: CheckAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Applies the rules asynchronously to validate a single object or state. If continueOnFailure is disabled (default), stops at the first rule failure. If continueOnFailure is enabled, collects all rule failures. Supports async conditions and rules.

parameters.description: A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A Result object indicating the success or failure of applying the rules.

parameters.description: A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A Result object indicating the success or failure of applying the rules.

symbols.name: Switch(IEnumerable, Func, Result>, Func, Result>)
symbols.summary: Splits the items into two groups based on the defined rules and processes them with separate handlers.

syntax.content: public Result Switch(IEnumerable items, Func, Result> matchHandler, Func, Result> unmatchHandler)

parameters.description: The collection of items to filter.
Handler for items that match all rules.
Handler for items that fail any rule.

returns.description: A Result indicating success of both handlers or failure with combined errors.

parameters.description: The collection of items to filter.
Handler for items that match all rules.
Handler for items that fail any rule.

returns.description: A Result indicating success of both handlers or failure with combined errors.

symbols.name: SwitchAsync(IEnumerable, Func, Task>, Func, Task>, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously splits the items into two groups based on the defined rules and processes them with separate handlers.

syntax.content: public Task SwitchAsync(IEnumerable items, Func, Task> matchHandler, Func, Task> unmatchHandler, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The collection of items to filter.
Async handler for items that match all rules.
Async handler for items that fail any rule.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task containing a Result indicating success of both handlers or failure with combined errors.

parameters.description: The collection of items to filter.
Async handler for items that match all rules.
Async handler for items that fail any rule.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task containing a Result indicating success of both handlers or failure with combined errors.
